entities.name: SOIL SALINITY
entities.description: The increase of salt in soil due to human and environmental factors.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living stress factors affecting plants, specifically soil salinity.

entities.name: CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Plants grown for food or other economic purposes.

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: Reduction in the amount of crop produced due to stress.

entities.name: SALT STRESS
entities.description: Stress induced by high salt concentrations in the environment.

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION PATTERNS
entities.description: The process by which information from a gene is used in the synthesis of a functional gene product.

entities.name: SIGNAL TRANSDUCTION CASCADES
entities.description: A series of chemical reactions in which a signal is passed from one molecule to another.

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand and grow in saline conditions.

entities.name: GENETIC APPROACHES
entities.description: Classical methods used to improve plant traits.

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: Direct manipulation of an organism's genes using biotechnology.

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism.

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: Technologies used to make precise changes to the DNA of a living organism.

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING RHIZOBACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that colonize the rhizosphere and enhance plant growth.

entities.name: EPIGENETICS
entities.description: The study of heritable changes in gene expression that do not involve changes to the underlying DNA sequence.

entities.name: EPIGENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: Heritable genome-wide changes in gene expression without DNA sequence alteration.

entities.name: EPIGENETIC RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A method to create and exploit epigenetic variation in plants.

entities.name: EPIGENETIC VARIANTS
entities.description: Individuals or lines that differ in their epigenetic marks.

entities.name: MEIOTIC CROSSOVER FREQUENCY
entities.description: The rate at which genetic material is exchanged between homologous chromosomes during meiosis.
